name: Eggplant Matzo Mina
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Mozzarella style soy cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
Pre-heat the broiler. Cut eggplants into 1/2 inch slices and peel them. Brush lightly with oil and broil on each side until tender.
Heat the oil in a deep pot. Add onion and garlic and saute until golden. Add tomato sauce, tomatoes, parsley, and seasonings. Bring to a simmer and cook over low heat, covered, for 15 minutes.
Break each matzo into 3 strips. Place them in a shallow casserole dish with lightly salted water. Cover the dish and place it in the oven at 350°F.
Place matzo strips into the water for 2 to 3 minutes, until pliable but not mushy. Remove carefully to a plate.
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Lightly oil a large, shallow casserole dish and layer as follows: a thin layer of sauce, a layer of eggplant, a layer of matzo, a layer of cheese. Repeat.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes until cheese shows some brown spots.
